title: festuca spadicea subsp. aurea
intro: Festuca spadicea subsp. aurea, also known as golden fescue, is a subspecies of grass native to Europe. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, and has been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Festuca spadicea subsp. aurea include reducing inflammation, soothing digestive issues, and acting as an antioxidant. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed orally or applied topically to harness its medicinal properties.
